title: MTG Inventory Tracker App for iPhone
description: MTG Inventory Tracker App for iPhone. Track MTG stock, duplicates, storage locations, and exports from one organized inventory with Spellvault.

hero.title: MTG Inventory Tracker App
hero.description: Track copies, stock, locations, and exports from one clear MTG inventory view.

sections.title: The best MTG Inventory Tracker App
sections.description: Spellvault helps you manage real card inventory, so you always know what you own, where it is, and what is available.

items.title: Track copies and stock
items.description: See how many copies you own, which cards are repeated, and what inventory is available for trade, sale, or storage.

items.title: Keep storage locations organized
items.description: Track boxes, binders, folders, and sale inventory so your card locations stay clear as inventory changes.

items.title: Export inventory when needed
items.description: Prepare inventory for review, backup, sharing, or sales workflows without rebuilding everything by hand.

sections.title: Manage MTG inventory with less manual work
sections.description: Use Spellvault to keep inventory, duplicates, exports, and storage locations easier to understand and easier to maintain.

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Helpful answers about using Spellvault as your MTG Inventory Tracker App.

items.title: What is an MTG inventory tracker?
items.description: An MTG inventory tracker helps you manage cards, copies, locations, and stock in a way that is more useful than a simple list.

items.title: Can I track duplicate cards and stock levels?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault makes it easier to see repeated copies, understand what is available, and decide what can move to sale or trade.

items.title: Can I track boxes, binders, and sale inventory?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is designed for real inventory structure, so you can keep storage and sale locations clearer over time.

items.title: Can I export my MTG inventory?
items.description: Yes. Inventory exports are useful for backups, review, sharing, and workflows that require your card data outside the app.

items.title: Is Spellvault useful for MTG stores and sellers?
items.description: Yes. Sellers and stores benefit from stronger inventory visibility, duplicate tracking, and cleaner location data.

items.title: Does Spellvault help keep storage locations clear?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault helps you connect cards to folders, binders, boxes, and other storage areas, so locations stay easier to follow.

items.title: Can I use inventory tracking together with price tracking?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault keeps inventory and pricing close together, so you can manage stock without losing the value context around it.

items.title: Why use Spellvault instead of a spreadsheet for MTG inventory?
items.description: Spreadsheets can list cards, but Spellvault helps you manage duplicates, locations, exports, and collection context in a workflow built for MTG inventory.
